title: Author AgentCapabilityCatalog typed shape — per-agent ability roster
description:
Gap from [[agent-abilities-pokemon-mechanics-with-topology-2026-05-26]]. Substrate needs a typed AgentCapabilityCatalog that enumerates which abilities a given agent CAN acquire (capability catalog) vs which it CURRENTLY HAS acquired (active roster). Likely shape: `{ agentSlug, catalogVersion, starterAbilities: [LinkRefModel], acquirableAbilities: [LinkRefModel], currentlyAcquired: [LinkRefModel], classification: { hmEquivalents: [...], tmEquivalents: [...], specialty: [...] } }`. Per the topology-not-hard-cap doctrine, NO budget field — counts are descriptive, not prescriptive. Location: schema-universal under domain/ai/schema-families/ (probably). Audit existing capability-adjacent shapes first per [[audit-schema-universal-before-authoring-new-types]] — substrate has WorkflowRoleFrontierCapability and baseline-capability-schemas; neither matches this shape exactly. Tests at Tier 3.

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- LinkRefModel (link-ref-schemas v0.3.0) — every ability reference uses LinkRef wire format
- (no direct cost-type composition — capability catalog is metadata, not cost-bearing)
